tasks.subject: Task 1: 브릿지 Suno fetch + parse (bridge/src/suno.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Suno 공개 재생목록 URL → { label, tracks:[{url,title}], total, truncated }. JSON API 1차 + HTML 임베드 JSON 2차 폴백, 주입형 fetch.

**Files:** Create bridge/src/suno.ts, bridge/src/suno.test.ts

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/suno.ts", "bridge/src/suno.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["id 추출 + bad_request throw", "JSON API 클립 매핑 + label", "HTML 폴백 audio_url/title 추출", "maxPlaylist 잘림 truncated", "비-http audio_url 제외"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 브릿지 /music/suno 라우트 + 핸들러
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /music/suno (Bearer) → body {url} 검증 후 fetchSunoPlaylist 호출, 200 JSON 응답. 데스크탑 미경유.

**Files:** Modify bridge/src/music.ts (handleSunoPlaylist), bridge/src/server.ts (route + SUNO_MAX_PLAYLIST), bridge/src/music.test.ts

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/music.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts", "bridge/src/music.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 no Bearer / 400 missing url no-fetch", "200 returns fetchSunoPlaylist result", "bad_request→400 else→502"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: parseSunoLine.ts — SUNO: 줄 탐지
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 음악:: 노트 doc에서 SUNO:<url> 단락 → { url, paraPos, alreadyImported }.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/music/parseSunoLine.ts, app/tests/unit/music/parseSunoLine.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/parseSunoLine.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/parseSunoLine.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/parseSunoLine.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/parseSunoLine.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["url 추출 대소문자/공백 허용", "다음 블록 헤더→alreadyImported", "비-음악 노트 빈 배열", "matchSunoLine 재사용"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: writeSunoPlaylistBlock.ts — 패턴 A 블록 삽입
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SUNO: 줄 아래에 [x]플레이리스트: 헤더 + 패턴 A(제목+중첩 URL) 트랙 리스트 삽입.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/music/writeSunoPlaylistBlock.ts, app/tests/unit/music/writeSunoPlaylistBlock.test.ts, app/tests/unit/music/sunoBlockRoundtrip.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/writeSunoPlaylistBlock.test.ts tests/unit/music/sunoBlockRoundtrip.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/writeSunoPlaylistBlock.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/writeSunoPlaylistBlock.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/sunoBlockRoundtrip.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/writeSunoPlaylistBlock.test.ts tests/unit/music/sunoBlockRoundtrip.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["헤더 checked:true + label", "패턴A 제목+중첩 URL", "parseMusicNote display=제목 url=audio_url", "라운드트립 href 보존", "빈/파괴/이미헤더 false"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: sunoClient.ts — 브릿지 /music/suno 클라이언트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetchSunoPlaylist({url}) → POST /music/suno, SunoError kind, 빈 tracks는 empty.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/music/sunoClient.ts, app/tests/unit/music/sunoClient.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/sunoClient.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/sunoClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/sunoClient.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/sunoClient.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["not_configured 미설정", "status→kind 매핑 + network", "빈 tracks→empty", "정상 매핑 + 불량 필터"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: sunoNote 플러그인 + 클릭 핸들러 + 에디터 등록 + CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 음악:: 노트 미가져온 SUNO: 줄 우측 가져오기 버튼 → fetch→write+토스트. TomboySunoImport 등록.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/editor/sunoNote/{sunoImportPlugin,runSunoImportClick,index}.ts; Modify app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte; Test app/tests/unit/music/sunoImportPlugin.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/sunoImportPlugin.test.ts && cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/sunoNote/sunoImportPlugin.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/sunoNote/runSunoImportClick.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/sunoNote/index.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte", "app/tests/unit/music/sunoImportPlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/sunoImportPlugin.test.ts && cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["미가져온 줄 1버튼 / 이미·비음악 0", "click→fetch→write+한국어 토스트", "TomboySunoImport 등록", "pointerdown/mousedown swallow"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 설정 가이드 카드 갱신
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 음악 노트 가이드 카드의 'SUNO 향후 추가 예정' 문구를 실제 사용법으로 교체.

**Files:** Modify app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte:1806-1807

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SUNO:<url> + 가져오기 사용법 노출", "직접링크/삭제시 재생불가/브릿지 선행/재가져오기/100곡", "npm run check 통과"]}
```
